code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output: a single rating 1-5 (e.g. "Rating: 3" or just "3")
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
1. 1-Star: Complete failure, defective, unsafe, or returned. Strong negativity with no redeeming qualities.
2. 2-Star: More negative than positive. Significant flaws diminish usefulness, but product has limited function.
3. 3-Star: Balanced mix. "Okay," "average," "better than nothing." Functional with clear limitations.
4. 4-Star: Mostly positive with minor criticisms. "Pretty good," "above average," works well overall.
5. 5-Star: Strong enthusiasm and clear recommendation. "Love," "perfect," "excellent." Exceeds expectations.
6. Inherent/expected drawbacks (ironing cotton, normal limitations) in otherwise glowing reviews → 5, not 4.
7. Mixed utility: "Great for X but not for Y" without overall enthusiasm → 3. Single limitation in otherwise positive review → 4.
8. Updates ending negatively → use final evaluation. Initial praise overridden by later disappointment → lower rating.
9. Clear enthusiastic recommendation → 5. Moderate recommendation → 4.
10. Product works as intended with no major issues but limited excitement → 4. Exceeds basic expectations → 5.
11. "Wouldn't buy again" → 1 or 2 unless product functions adequately with major flaws → 2.
12. Positive descriptive reviews that focus on features without strong emotion → 4, not 3. Downgrade to 3 only with mixed feelings or significant drawbacks.
13. Distinguish 4 vs 5: Strong satisfaction outweighing minor inconvenience → 4. Perfection, clear "love" or "excellent" → 5.
14. Distinguish 2 vs 3: More negative than positive with significant flaws → 2. Balanced mix → 3. "Better than nothing" → 3.
15. Reviews meeting all criteria with positive conclusion → 5, even if not extremely emotional.
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it. The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri...
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: Very poor quality. Cheap fabric, not as pictured and the color was off. Returned the next day.
Rating: 1

Example 3:
Review: This was pretty straightforward to put together, feels very sturdy, leaves lots of room underneath for storage (plus a little space I left open because the dog seems to be happy about being able to curl up under there and use it as a hiding place), allowed us to get rid of the box spring, and hasn't...
Rating: 2

Example 4:
Review: The cushions are okay, but the size was waaaay off for my rocker. I'm still using it though because it is better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 5:
Review: These are really nice IF you only use them for bigger items. They are too thick and bulky for smaller items.
Rating: 3

Example 6:
Review: I like this towel. It is 100% Turkish cotton and measures 27 inches by 55 inches. The dobby weave is somewhat intricate so you are going to get some good absorbency. This towel also comes in a bath sheet, which is competively priced with the local st...
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: They're okay, but not extraordinary. They seem to be well made and are holding up so far with no problems, and the fact that you can toss them into the washing machine to be cleaned is nice. They're just a bit on the thin side as well, though, so you...
Rating: 4

Example 8:
Review: After a couple days a giant (though compact by queen sized bed standards) box arrived, and while I anticipated the weight (I've had a few of these shipped to me), it's still heavy.  Ideally you'll get this unpacked in the AM, as it does take a moment...
Rating: 5

Example 9:
Review: This is a sharp well made tablecloth. It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction. The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  Rating 5: 2 example(s)

  gold 4 -> 5: 7
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 3 -> 4: 1

When not in use, it collapses, though again we use it a lot.  Sometimes we put more weight in here that perhaps we shoul..." (gold=5, pred=4, workers=[4, 4, 5], disagreement=0.17)

The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..." (gold=4, pred=5, workers=[5, 4, 5], disagreement=0.17)

What you get is a cool-brown no..." (gold=4, pred=3, workers=[3, 4, 3], disagreement=0.17)
    - Example: "Wish I had ordered the small ones. These are quite large for most kitchen counters. They will do the job but I will put them in a drawer. I like the colors.and the material." (gold=4, pred=3, workers=[3, 4, 3], disagreement=0.17)

What you get is a cool-brown no..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 4, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "I bought this machine after reading pretty good customer reviews and boy how I regret it.

The first time I used it I noticed more spots when I was through than when I started. My granddaughter can be a bit messy and I bought this to clean little dri..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 2 | Workers: [1, 2, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "There are two kinds of DII fabric storage bins - the ones that are reinforced and the ones that aren't. The ones that aren't tend to flop around and tip over. The ones that are reinforced are so much better. This one is the better style that actually..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This is a good, and rather useful bin.  It's well made, has sturdy handles, and gets lots of use in our house, which says a lot.  When not in use, it collapses, though again we use it a lot.  Sometimes we put more weight in here that perhaps we shoul..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "These are a great color, easy to wipe clean, and the perfect size for grabbing easy trays out of the oven or carrying hot pots from the kitchen to the dining area. My friend uses these short ones most all the time, unless she needs to grab the bulky ..."

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "These deep teal color of these clothes was exactly the shade I was hoping they would be. Sometimes things are called teal but aren't very true to the color, but these are. It's my teen daughter's favorite color and one of the colors we used in the de..."

  2. Review: "Since buying this product and it dying 12 months later I've owned numerous carpet cleaners including the Bissel Proheat 2X Pet Lift Off and the at-home version of the Rug Doctor. Both of these blew the performance of this machine out of the water. Th..."

  3. Review: "The great thing about this product is that it works perfectly. The bad thing is that if you want to buy it on Amazon now (as of September 2011), you'll have to wait for 1 to 2 months.
